case_title: CAVALRY SPV I LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK N.A VS. XING YUAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK N.A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YUAN, XING $4,661.82 PRINCIPAL, $324.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,985.82, SEE SCANNED DOC
